Protecting Lives Early:
HepB3 Vaccination Around the World

Every child deserves protection from a preventable disease.

Author

Dimitra Kalampoka

Published

April 14, 2026

Hepatitis B can be stopped with three vaccine doses given early in life, a core commitment under United Nations Sustainable Development Goal  3. HepB3 vaccination coverage shows where children are protected, where gaps remain and how close the world is to the WHO goal of at least 90% coverage for every country.

NoteWHO classification according to vaccination coverage:
  • Urgent action required (<70%)
  • Action needed (70-79%)
  • Acceptable but below target (80-89%)
  • Within target (>90%)
Code 
from google.colab import drive
drive.mount("/content/drive")
Code 
import polars as pl
from plotnine import *

unicef_indicator2=pl.read_csv('/content/drive/MyDrive/unicef_indicator_2.csv')
unicef_metadata=pl.read_csv('/content/drive/MyDrive/unicef_metadata.csv')
Code 
unicef_metadata.head() #check that data frame column names and values are correct
Code 
unicef_indicator2 = unicef_indicator2.rename({"time_period":"year"}) #renaming column to facilitate join in next steps
unicef_indicator2.head() #check that data frame column names and values are correct
Code 
joined_data =  unicef_indicator2.join(unicef_metadata, on=['numeric_code','year'], how = "full") #joined the data frames into a new data frame
joined_data = joined_data.rename({"obs_value":"HepB3_vaccination(%)"}) #renamed column to facilitate analysis
joined_data.head() #check that data frame column names and values are correct
Code 
import geopandas as gp

shape_world = gp.read_file("https://public.opendatasoft.com/api/explore/v2.1/catalog/datasets/world-administrative-boundaries/exports/shp")

country_code = pl.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/adrivsh/country_names/refs/heads/master/names_to_iso.csv")
joined_data_code = (joined_data.join(country_code, on="country", how="left"))
joined_data_code_2023 = (joined_data_code.filter(pl.col("year") == 2023))
shape_joined_data_code_2023 = (shape_world
  .merge(joined_data_code_2023.to_pandas(), on="iso3", how="outer")
)

(ggplot(data=shape_joined_data_code_2023)
  + aes(fill="HepB3_vaccination(%)")
  + geom_map()
  + scale_fill_gradient(low="red", high="green")
  + labs(
      title="The Global View: HebB3 vaccination coverage in 2023",
      subtitle="No available data for countries in grey color",
      caption="Source: Unicef Data Warehouse",
      x="Longitude",
      y="Latitude",
      fill="HepB3_vaccination(%)"
  )
  + coord_fixed()
  + theme_bw()
)
ImportantWhat the global overview reveals

According to the latest available data (2023), the map highlights Africa and South America as the regions with the highest concentration of countries requiring immediate action under the WHO classification.

Let’s take a closer look: which 5 countries had the lowest HepB3 vaccination coverage in 2023?

Code 
#define a consistent color mapping for the 5 countries across the report
country_colors = {
    "Central African Republic": "#F79F9F",
    "Lebanon": "#8AC6D1",
    "Montenegro": "#A7D9A7",
    "Papua New Guinea": "#CCB3E6",
    "Yemen": "#FFD79B"
}

(joined_data
  .filter(pl.col("year") == 2023)
  .sort("HepB3_vaccination(%)")
  .head(5)
  >>
  ggplot(aes(x="country", y="HepB3_vaccination(%)", fill="country"))
  + geom_col()
  + geom_text(aes(label="HepB3_vaccination(%)"), nudge_y=1, size=10) #add data labels
  + scale_fill_manual(values=country_colors) #use manual color mapping
  + labs(
      title="Bottom 5 Countries by HepB3 Vaccination Coverage in 2023",
      x="Country",
      y="HepB3 Vaccination (%)"
    )
  + theme(axis_text_x=element_text(rotation=45, hjust=1))
  + guides(fill="none")
)

In these countries, how has HepB3 vaccination rate evolved over time?

Code 
bottom5_2023_pl = (joined_data
  .filter(pl.col("country").is_in(["Central African Republic", "Lebanon", "Montenegro", "Papua New Guinea", "Yemen"]))) #focusing on the 5 countries only

(ggplot(bottom5_2023_pl)
+ aes(x="year", y="HepB3_vaccination(%)", color="country")
+ geom_line(size=1.5)
+ scale_color_manual(values=country_colors) #use manual color mapping
+ facet_wrap("country", nrow=5)
+ labs(
      title="HepB3 Vaccination rate over time",
      x="Time",
      y="HepB3 Vaccination (%)"
    )
+ theme_classic()
+ guides(color="none")
)

What about Life expectancy at birth ?

Code 
(ggplot(bottom5_2023_pl)
+ aes(x="year", y="Life expectancy at birth, total (years)",color="country")
+ geom_point(size=2, shape='D') #add size and shape parameters
+ geom_smooth(method="lm")
+ scale_color_manual(values=country_colors) #use manual color mapping
+ facet_wrap("country", nrow=5)
+ labs(
      title="Life expectancy at birth over time",
      x="Time",
      y="Life expectancy at birth"
      )
+ theme_classic()
+ guides(color="none")
)

For those countries, is vaccination coverage related to income level?

Code 
(joined_data
  .filter(pl.col("year") == 2023)
  .sort("HepB3_vaccination(%)")
  .head(5)
  >>
 (ggplot(aes(x="HepB3_vaccination(%)", y="GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)", color="country"))
  + geom_point(size=2, shape='D')
  + geom_text(aes(label="country"), nudge_x=2.8, nudge_y=0.8, size=9) # Added data labels for country names
  + scale_color_manual(values=country_colors) # Use manual colors
  + labs(
      title="HepB3 vaccination vs. GDP per capita (US$) in 2023",
      subtitle="No GDP per capita information available for Yemen",
      x="HepB3 vaccination(%)",
      y="GDP per capita (US$)"
      )
  + theme_classic()
  + guides(color="none") #removed unnecessary legend as labels are added
))
TipFive countries. Immediate action. THE TIME TO ACT IS NOW.

Learn more about how you can help at : https://www.unicef.org/

Data Source : Unicef Data Warehouse
